definition: fit for ordering  or arranging , especially in war, τ. ἀνήρ a tactician , (Xenophon Historicus); τακτικὸν ἡγεῖσθαί τι to think it a good piece of tactics , (Xenophon Historicus); οἱ τ. ἀριθμοί the regular battalions, (Xenophon Historicus): τὰ τακτικά the art of drawing up soldiers in array, tactics , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
